name: 信息图/A+Content

defaults.features: 4-6 key features with icons and descriptions
defaults.layout: clean grid, product as focal point

tiktok-shop-detail.description: TikTok Shop 详情卖点图风格

overrides.layout: 4-quadrant module with banner, feature blocks, comparison, badges
overrides.data_vis: comparison table, ingredient chart, certification badges

overrides.layout: product centered with callout lines to feature blocks
vertical story: problem → solution → features → results

category_tips.beauty: ingredient breakdown with %, before/after data, dermatologist badges
category_tips.electronics: spec comparison, performance metrics, compatibility icons
category_tips.food: nutritional visualization, ingredient sourcing, recipe flow
category_tips.fashion: size guide, material composition, care instructions

examples: TikTok Shop short-video commerce detail visual. Use a clear top product hero, 3-4 concise factual selling-point callouts, and strong mobile-first hierarchy. Show only product facts supported by the references; do not add comparison tables, certification badges, ranking claims, or unsupported promises. {color} palette, vertical-friendly composition.
Product infographic. Left: {product} on gradient. Right: {n} feature blocks with icons vertically, callout lines connecting to product. Clean modern, {color} accents, 2000x2000px
{category} specification guide. Product centered with dimension callouts. Feature highlights with icons. Data visualization. Clean typography, mobile-friendly, 2000x2000px
